detail.description:
Honkai: Star Rail is a HoYoverse space fantasy RPG.
Hop aboard the Astral Express and experience the galaxy's infinite wonders filled with adventure and thrills.
Players will meet new companions across various worlds and maybe even run into some familiar faces. Overcome the struggles together caused by Stellaron and unravel the hidden truths behind it! May this journey lead us starward!

□ Explore Distinct Worlds — Discover the boundless universe filled with wonder
3, 2, 1, initiating warp! A sp
detail.recentChanges:
3rd Anniversary Version "So Laughed the Masses" is now available!
"New Characters" "Silver Wolf LV.999 (Elation: Imaginary)", "Evanescia (Elation: Physical)"
"Anniversary Rewards" Check in cumulatively to claim Star Rail Special Pass ×20, get an additional Star Rail Special Pass ×10 from Anniversary Gifts, and log in to receive a "Golden Companion Spirit," exchangeable for limited 5-star characters like "Huohuo" and "Robin"!
"New Story" Trailblaze Mission "Planarcadia - So Laughed the Masses"
